invariants.claim: Agreement/MVB semantics live outside NovaSeal core.
Repay terminal path is only before or at expiry.
Claim/default terminal path is only after expiry.
Borrower closes by repayment; lender claims after expiry.
Each implemented terminal path creates a NovaAgreementReceiptV0 output.
Wrong terms preimage is rejected by an on-chain canonical hash computation.
invariants.blocker: Need frozen Molecule preimage hashing or generated field-by-field terms commitment helper.

invariants.claim: Wrong receipt preimage is rejected by an on-chain canonical hash computation.
invariants.blocker: Need frozen receipt preimage hashing or generated receipt commitment helper.

invariants.claim: Native CKB funding, repayment, and claim output shapes are locally verified.
Compiled Agreement Profile action ELFs enforce terminal-path guards in CKB VM.
Action/type scripts and the local harness lock execute as lock/type groups in resolved CKB transactions.
Under-capacity agreement outputs are rejected by the CKB transaction verification stack.
Repayment and default payout cells are bound on-chain to the terminal receipt amount.
invariants.blocker: Current profile records terminal_amount and local shape checks model payout cells, but CellScript actions do not yet load and bind concrete payout outputs.
